'''√dh-s-t''' ('''dhasata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lairise|lairise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lairise|lairise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-s-t
|-
! Lemma
| dhasata
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || dhasatithi || dhasatiji || dhasatishi || dhasati
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || dhasatuthuth || dhasatujuj || dhasatushush || dhasat
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || dhasatuthu || dhasatuju || dhasatushu || dhasatu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || dhasatufuth || dhasatufuj || dhasatufush || dhasatuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dhasatethe || dhasateje || dhasateshe || dhasate
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || dhasatothoth || dhasatojoj || dhasatoshosh || dhasat
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || dhasatotho || dhasatojo || dhasatosho || dhasato
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || dhasatofoth || dhasatofoj || dhasatofosh || dhasatof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhasatïf || dhasatïf || dhasatïf || dhasatïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhasatïfïf || dhasatïfïf || dhasatïfïf || dhasatïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhasatïf || dhasatïf || dhasatïf || dhasatïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhasatïf || dhasatïf || dhasatïf || dhasatïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dhasatæthæ || dhasatæjæ || dhasatæshæ || dhasatæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || dhasatathath || dhasatajaj || dhasatashash || dhasat
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dhasatatha || dhasataja || dhasatasha || dhasata
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || dhasatafath || dhasatafaj || dhasatafash || dhasataf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || dhasatasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || godhasatasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokidhasatasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || dhasatnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || godhasatnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokidhasatnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || dhasatshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || godhasatnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokidhasatshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || dhasatroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || godhasatnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokidhasatroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || dhasatmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || godhasatnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokidhasatmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || dhasatsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || godhasatnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokidhasatsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || dhasatngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || godhasatnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokidhasatngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || dhasatyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || godhasatnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokidhasatyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || dhasatyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || godhasatnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokidhasatyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || dhasatnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || godhasatnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokidhasatnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || dhasatnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || godhasatnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidhasatnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || dhasatnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || godhasatnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokidhasatnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || dhasatshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || godhasatnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokidhasatshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || dhasatshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || godhasatnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidhasatshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || dhasatshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || godhasatnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokidhasatshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || dhasatronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || godhasatnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokidhasatronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || dhasatroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || godhasatnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokidhasatroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || dhasatromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || godhasatnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokidhasatromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || dhasatmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || godhasatnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokidhasatmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || dhasatmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || godhasatnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokidhasatmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || dhasatmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || godhasatnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidhasatmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || dhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || dhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hodhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hodhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohodhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohodhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüdhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüdhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïdhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïdhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || ludhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || ludhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luludhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luludhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lidhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lidhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilidhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilidhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kodhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kodhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokodhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokodhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kedhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kedhæsæt
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekedhasat
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekedhæsæt
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
